meaning: n.改进,改良,补丁,修理部分,好转vt.修改,改进,加快,修理,修补vi.好转,改善,改正
examples: My leg is definitely on the mend now.
They took a long time to mend the roof.
Somebody helped me to mend the puncture.
Now that the U.S. economy is on the mend, Textron has come roaring back.
Ford is investing in new plants. (Applause.) Chrysler is on the mend.
